content.query:
CREATE VIEW v_AdCraftStockReport_RD
-- drop view v_AdCraftStockReport_RD 
as 
SELECT      X2.*
,           ISNULL(B.[AllocatedQty], 0) as [AllocatedQty]
FROM

(
    SELECT X.Warehouse, X.[Item Number], X.[Item Description], X.[Category] 
, ISNULL(A.[Allocatable Net of Safety Stock], 0) as [Allocatable Net of Safety Stock]
, CASE WHEN cast(CAST([ETA Date] as varchar(10)) as date) > GETDATE() + 3 THEN cast(CAST([ETA Date] as varchar(10)) as date) ELSE NULL END as [Available Date] 
, [Kit Flag] 
FROM
(
    SELECT DISTINCT WH.WHLO AS Warehouse, MM.ITNO as [Item Number], MM.ITDS as [Item Description] , CS.TX40 as [Category], 'Non-Kit' as [Kit Flag] 
    FROM M3.MITWHL WH 
    CROSS JOIN M3.MITMAS MM 
    LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT STKY, TX40 FROM M3.CSYTAB WHERE STCO = 'ITGR') CS on MM.ITGR = CS.STKY 
    LEFT JOIN M3.MITFAC MF ON MM.ITNO = MF.ITNO 
    WHERE WH.DIVI = 'TLC' 
    AND MM.STAT = '20' 
    AND MF.FACI = 'TLC' 
    AND MM.ITNO IN 
    (
        'PW36', 'PW36I', 'COF-60-NG', 'BDGF-ES35-NG', 'CDFZ-1D-1.4', 'CDFZ-1D-1.8', 'CDFZ-1D-3.5', 'SLMER-2D', 'SLMPREP-1D', 'SLMPREP-2DW', 
        'SLPREP-1D', 'SLUF48', 'SLUR48', 'CP-100', 'DF-6L', 'DF-6L-2', 'FW-1200W', 'FW-1200WR', 'FW-1500W-C', 'GRID-16', 'GW-120', 'HL-2A', 
        'RC-E30', 'RDFW-1200NP', 'RG-09-COV', 'WB-100', 'WB-40', 'CTH-12', 'CTSP-1-NG', 'ECTC-16-NG', 'ECTC-24-NG', 'ECTC-36-NG', 'ECTG-16-NG', 
        'ECTG-24-NG', 'ECTG-36-NG', 'GF-120-LPG', 'GF-120-NG', 'GF-150-LPG', 'GF-150-NG', 'GF-90-LPG', 'GF-90-NG', 'GR-36-NG', 'GF-39', 
        'LUIM-120', 'LUIM-150', 'LUIM-210', 'LUIM-260', 'LUIM-360', 'LUIM-360B', 'LUIM-500', 'BDCF-10R', 'BDCF-13R', 'BDCF-16-2R', 'BDCF-5', 'GRFZ-1D', 'GRFZ-2D', 'GRRF-1D', 
        'GRRF-2D', 'GRSL-1D', 'GRSL-2D', 'GRSL-2D-60', 'GRSLM-1D', 'GRSLM-2D', 'GRSLM-2D-60', 'GRUCFZ-48', 'GRUCRF-48', 'USRFS-1D-22', 
        'USRFS-1D-B', 'USRFS-2D-54', 'USRFS-2D-B', 'ES-3024', 'ES-3036', 'ES-3048', 'ES-3060', 'ES-3072', 'WT-2424-E', 'WT-2436-E', 'WT-2448-E', 
        'WT-3048-E', 'WT-3060-E', 'WT-3072-E', '4-1-50', '4-1-25', '10HC', '165F2', '165F4', '165H2', '165H4', '4-1-100', 'AB-12', 'AB-20', 
        'AB-40', 'AB-50', 'AB-60', 'AES-1', 'AHM-5', 'AL275-DF-B', 'AL275-DK-B', 'AL275-DS-B', 'ALM-05', 'ALM-1', 'ALM-2', 'ALM-4', 'ALS-5', 
        'ALS-6', 'ALS-8', 'ALS-9', 'AMC-70', 'ATD-4S', 'AWC-9', 'BC-4ST', 'BFSM-1125', 'BFSM-850', 'BFSM-950', 'BG-3', 'BG-5', 'BG-8', 
        'BRGH-10-PKG', 'BRGH-16-PKG', 'BRGH-24-PKG', 'BS-30', 'BS-90-PKG', 'BST-22-PKG', 'CAM-5', 'CAP-10C', 'CAP-10F', 'CAP-12C', 'CAP-12F', 
        'CAP-8C', 'CAP-8F', 'CBEL', 'CCT-1220', 'CDJ-6', 'CHE-4', 'CKT-9', 'COL-14', 'COL-5', 'COL-8', 'CS-13A', 'CYL-M', 'D-32GSA', 'DBTN-10', 
        'DBTN-10RB', 'DBTN-12', 'DBTN-14', 'DCH-200F', 'DFF-19', 'DIV-200F', 'DMC-4', 'DMS-4-PKG', 'DPE-11', 'DPE-13', 'DPE-15', 'DRE-10', 
        'DSL-11', 'DSL-13', 'DSL-15', 'DSO-11', 'DSO-13', 'DSO-15', 'DTT-20', 'DWP-200', 'FB-917', 'FBR-11571', 'FBR-13558', 'FBR-13612', 
        'FBR-13912', 'FBR-16315', 'FBR-16834', 'FBS-28', 'FC-165', 'FLS-8', 'FWE-10', 'FWE-12', 'FWE-14', 'FWE-16', 'FWE-18', 'FWE-20', 'FWE-24', 
        'FWE-36', 'GNP-10', 'GR-14H', 'GR-18H', 'GRG-6', 'GRV-8', 'GRY-4', 'GS-25', 'GT-20', 'GTC-6P', 'H3-FP10', 'H3-FP5', 'H3-SAU5', 'H3-SAU75', 
        'H3-SP140', 'H3-SP140C', 'HBC-3-PKG', 'HBC-5-PKG', 'HBC-8-PKG', 'HC-200F', 'HCC-12', 'HCW-1', 'HCW-5', 'HO-30-PKG', 'JST-31-PKG', 'KR-12', 
        'KT-25', 'KT-27', 'KT-64', 'KT-65', 'KT-65P', 'LAD-24', 'LAD-32', 'LAF-7', 'LCH-2', 'LD-12', 'LIPC-3', 'LLS-24', 'LUT-10', 'LUT-12', 
        'LUT-16', 'MAG-18', 'MBS-16', 'MC240-DF-RD', 'MC240-DK-RD', 'MC240-DS-RD', 'MC240-LTS-RD', 'MC-7', 'MLB-2-PKG', 'MS-2000-RD', 'MTA-10', 
        'MW-42', 'NL-0', 'OPD-14', 'OPD-16', 'OPD-18', 'OPD-22', 'OYC-2-PKG', 'PEP-12', 'PF-12', 'PF-21', 'PMR-18', 'PMR-24', 'PP-200F2', 
        'PP-200F4', 'PP-200H2', 'PP-200H4', 'PP-605', 'PR-15', 'PSS-64GB', 'PT-6-PKG', 'PWE-10', 'PWE-12', 'PWE-14', 'PWE-16', 'PWE-18', 
        'PZ-7007E', 'PZ-DD5704', 'PZ-DRPE800', 'RDS-7', 'RES-48PK', 'ROP-13', 'ROP-15', 'RW-MS-9', 'RW-PF-11', 'RW-PS-11', 'RW-SL-12', 
        'RW-SO-12', 'S-117', 'SAP-566', 'SAP-88', 'SBL-13D', 'SBL-16', 'SBL-1D', 'SBL-20', 'SBL-2D', 'SBL-3D', 'SBL-4D', 'SBL-5D', 'SBL-8D', 
        'SCT-11', 'SEP-12GN', 'SER-7', 'SFH-1', 'SGTN-10', 'SIB-40', 'SIE-12', 'SK-1149-RD', 'SKEW-12', 'SL-80', 'SLVFE1000', 'SPA-8', 'SPH-13PE', 
        'SPH-13SL', 'SPH-13SO', 'SPIL-21', 'SQS-7', 'SSP-100', 'SSS-4', 'SST-8', 'ST-80', 'STK-249-RD', 'STK-858-RD', 'STP-10GB', 'STP-32GB', 
        'STRAP-2-PKG', 'SZ-10', 'SZ-11', 'SZ-12', 'TBL-7', 'TEN-12', 'THD-113', 'TPC-4', 'TST-2B', 'VEN-DF-B', 'VEN-DF-RD', 'VEN-DK-B', 'VEN-DK-RD', 
        'VEN-DS-RD', 'VEN-LTS-RD', 'W57-GL-B', 'WB-8', 'WCS-777', 'WMD-8-PKG', 'WPG-1018', 'WPG-1624', 'WPG-810', 'WPM-24', 'WSI-84', 'WSK-12', 
        'WSK-6', 'WSK-60-RD', 'WSK-7', 'WSK-8', 'WSK-9', 'WSS-4', 'WSS-7-B', 'WU-10', 'WU-11', 'WU-12', 'XHT-10', 'XHT-12', 'XHT-16', 'ZZD-12', 
        'ZZD-16', 'LUIB-75', 'LUIB-470', 'LUIM-75', 'LUIM-80', 'ACIB17508', 'ACIB35010', 'ACIB75016', 'ACIBS10', 'ACIBS16', 'ACMIC1000D', 'ACMIC1000E', 'CUA100', 'CUA55',
        'SLFRZ-1D','SLFRZ-1DES','SLFRZ-2D','SLFRZ-2DES','SLMER-1D','SLMER-1D-22','SLMER-2D','SLMER-2D','SLMPREP-1D','SLMPREP-1D','SLMPREP-2D','SLMPREP-2DW','SLPREP-1D',
        'SLPREP-1D','SLPREP-2D','SLREF-1D','SLREF-1DES','SLREF-2D','SLREF-2DES','SLUF27','SLUF48','SLUF48','SLUR27','SLUR48','SLUR48',
        'FBR-11-PRESS', 'FBR-13612NC', 'FBR-825NC', 'FBR-TACO') 
        ) X 
        
        LEFT JOIN 
        
        ( 
            SELECT BA.ITNO as [Item Number] , WHLO as [Warehouse] , AVAL - ALQT - SSQT as [Allocatable Net of Safety Stock] 
            from M3.MITBAL BA 
        ) A ON X.Warehouse = A.Warehouse and X.[Item Number] = A.[Item Number] 
        
        LEFT JOIN 
        
        ( 
            SELECT DISTINCT ITNO, UID2 as [ETA Date] 
            FROM M3.MPLINE
            WHERE ITNO+CAST(UID2 AS VARCHAR(MAX)) IN ( 
                SELECT ITNO+CAST(MIN(UID2) AS VARCHAR(MAX)) as next_date 
                FROM M3.MPLINE 
                GROUP BY ITNO                           ) 
            and UID2 <> 0 ) B ON X.[Item Number] = B.ITNO 
            
            WHERE X.[Item Number] NOT IN ( 
                SELECT DISTINCT PRNO 
                FROM M3.MPDMAT 
                WHERE STRT = 'KIT' ) 
                
                UNION ALL 
                
                SELECT X.Warehouse, X.[Item Number], X.[Item Description], X.[Category]
                , MIN(ISNULL(FLOOR((AVAL - ALQT - SSQT)*1.00/CNQT), 0)) as [Allocatable Net of Safety Stock] 
                , NULL AS [ETA Date] , [Kit Flag]
                FROM ( 
                    SELECT DISTINCT WH.WHLO AS Warehouse, MM.ITNO as [Item Number], MM.ITDS as [Item Description] , CS.TX40 as [Category]
                    , 'Kit' as [Kit Flag], MP.MTNO AS [Component] 
                    FROM M3.MITWHL WH 
                    CROSS JOIN M3.MITMAS MM 
                    LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT STKY, TX40 FROM M3.CSYTAB WHERE STCO = 'ITGR') CS on MM.ITGR = CS.STKY 
                    LEFT JOIN M3.MITFAC MF ON MM.ITNO = MF.ITNO 
                    LEFT JOIN M3.MPDMAT MP ON MM.ITNO = MP.PRNO 
                    WHERE WH.DIVI = 'TLC' 
                    AND MM.STAT = '20' 
                    AND STRT = 'KIT' 
                    AND MF.FACI = 'TLC' 
                    AND MM.ITNO IN ( 
                        'PW36', 'PW36I', 'COF-60-NG', 'BDGF-ES35-NG', 'CDFZ-1D-1.4', 'CDFZ-1D-1.8', 'CDFZ-1D-3.5', 'SLMER-2D', 'SLMPREP-1D', 
                        'SLMPREP-2DW', 'SLPREP-1D', 'SLUF48', 'SLUR48', 'CP-100', 'DF-6L', 'DF-6L-2', 'FW-1200W', 'FW-1200WR', 'FW-1500W-C', 
                        'GRID-16', 'GW-120', 'HL-2A', 'RC-E30', 'RDFW-1200NP', 'RG-09-COV', 'WB-100', 'WB-40', 'CTH-12', 'CTSP-1-NG', 'ECTC-16-NG', 
                        'ECTC-24-NG', 'ECTC-36-NG', 'ECTG-16-NG', 'ECTG-24-NG', 'ECTG-36-NG', 'GF-120-LPG', 'GF-120-NG', 'GF-150-LPG', 'GF-150-NG', 
                        'GF-90-LPG', 'GF-90-NG', 'GR-36-NG', 'GF-39', 'LUIM-120', 'LUIM-150', 'LUIM-210', 'LUIM-260', 'LUIM-360', 'LUIM-360B', 'LUIM-500', 'BDCF-10R', 'BDCF-13R', 
                        'BDCF-16-2R', 'BDCF-5', 'GRFZ-1D', 'GRFZ-2D', 'GRRF-1D', 'GRRF-2D', 'GRSL-1D', 'GRSL-2D', 'GRSL-2D-60', 'GRSLM-1D', 
                        'GRSLM-2D', 'GRSLM-2D-60', 'GRUCFZ-48', 'GRUCRF-48', 'USRFS-1D-22', 'USRFS-1D-B', 'USRFS-2D-54', 'USRFS-2D-B', 'ES-3024', 
                        'ES-3036', 'ES-3048', 'ES-3060', 'ES-3072', 'WT-2424-E', 'WT-2436-E', 'WT-2448-E', 'WT-3048-E', 'WT-3060-E', 'WT-3072-E', 
                        '4-1-50', '4-1-25', '10HC', '165F2', '165F4', '165H2', '165H4', '4-1-100', 'AB-12', 'AB-20', 'AB-40', 'AB-50', 'AB-60', 
                        'AES-1', 'AHM-5', 'AL275-DF-B', 'AL275-DK-B', 'AL275-DS-B', 'ALM-05', 'ALM-1', 'ALM-2', 'ALM-4', 'ALS-5', 'ALS-6', 'ALS-8', 
                        'ALS-9', 'AMC-70', 'ATD-4S', 'AWC-9', 'BC-4ST', 'BFSM-1125', 'BFSM-850', 'BFSM-950', 'BG-3', 'BG-5', 'BG-8', 'BRGH-10-PKG', 
                        'BRGH-16-PKG', 'BRGH-24-PKG', 'BS-30', 'BS-90-PKG', 'BST-22-PKG', 'CAM-5', 'CAP-10C', 'CAP-10F', 'CAP-12C', 'CAP-12F', 
                        'CAP-8C', 'CAP-8F', 'CBEL', 'CCT-1220', 'CDJ-6', 'CHE-4', 'CKT-9', 'COL-14', 'COL-5', 'COL-8', 'CS-13A', 'CYL-M', 'D-32GSA', 
                        'DBTN-10', 'DBTN-10RB', 'DBTN-12', 'DBTN-14', 'DCH-200F', 'DFF-19', 'DIV-200F', 'DMC-4', 'DMS-4-PKG', 'DPE-11', 'DPE-13', 
                        'DPE-15', 'DRE-10', 'DSL-11', 'DSL-13', 'DSL-15', 'DSO-11', 'DSO-13', 'DSO-15', 'DTT-20', 'DWP-200', 'FB-917', 'FBR-11571', 
                        'FBR-13558', 'FBR-13612', 'FBR-13912', 'FBR-16315', 'FBR-16834', 'FBS-28', 'FC-165', 'FLS-8', 'FWE-10', 'FWE-12', 'FWE-14', 
                        'FWE-16', 'FWE-18', 'FWE-20', 'FWE-24', 'FWE-36', 'GNP-10', 'GR-14H', 'GR-18H', 'GRG-6', 'GRV-8', 'GRY-4', 'GS-25', 'GT-20', 
                        'GTC-6P', 'H3-FP10', 'H3-FP5', 'H3-SAU5', 'H3-SAU75', 'H3-SP140', 'H3-SP140C', 'HBC-3-PKG', 'HBC-5-PKG', 'HBC-8-PKG', 
                        'HC-200F', 'HCC-12', 'HCW-1', 'HCW-5', 'HO-30-PKG', 'JST-31-PKG', 'KR-12', 'KT-25', 'KT-27', 'KT-64', 'KT-65', 'KT-65P', 
                        'LAD-24', 'LAD-32', 'LAF-7', 'LCH-2', 'LD-12', 'LIPC-3', 'LLS-24', 'LUT-10', 'LUT-12', 'LUT-16', 'MAG-18', 'MBS-16', 
                        'MC240-DF-RD', 'MC240-DK-RD', 'MC240-DS-RD', 'MC240-LTS-RD', 'MC-7', 'MLB-2-PKG', 'MS-2000-RD', 'MTA-10', 'MW-42', 'NL-0', 
                        'OPD-14', 'OPD-16', 'OPD-18', 'OPD-22', 'OYC-2-PKG', 'PEP-12', 'PF-12', 'PF-21', 'PMR-18', 'PMR-24', 'PP-200F2', 'PP-200F4', 
                        'PP-200H2', 'PP-200H4', 'PP-605', 'PR-15', 'PSS-64GB', 'PT-6-PKG', 'PWE-10', 'PWE-12', 'PWE-14', 'PWE-16', 'PWE-18', 
                        'PZ-7007E', 'PZ-DD5704', 'PZ-DRPE800', 'RDS-7', 'RES-48PK', 'ROP-13', 'ROP-15', 'RW-MS-9', 'RW-PF-11', 'RW-PS-11', 'RW-SL-12', 
                        'RW-SO-12', 'S-117', 'SAP-566', 'SAP-88', 'SBL-13D', 'SBL-16', 'SBL-1D', 'SBL-20', 'SBL-2D', 'SBL-3D', 'SBL-4D', 'SBL-5D', 
                        'SBL-8D', 'SCT-11', 'SEP-12GN', 'SER-7', 'SFH-1', 'SGTN-10', 'SIB-40', 'SIE-12', 'SK-1149-RD', 'SKEW-12', 'SL-80', 'SLVFE1000', 
                        'SPA-8', 'SPH-13PE', 'SPH-13SL', 'SPH-13SO', 'SPIL-21', 'SQS-7', 'SSP-100', 'SSS-4', 'SST-8', 'ST-80', 'STK-249-RD', 
                        'STK-858-RD', 'STP-10GB', 'STP-32GB', 'STRAP-2-PKG', 'SZ-10', 'SZ-11', 'SZ-12', 'TBL-7', 'TEN-12', 'THD-113', 'TPC-4', 
                        'TST-2B', 'VEN-DF-B', 'VEN-DF-RD', 'VEN-DK-B', 'VEN-DK-RD', 'VEN-DS-RD', 'VEN-LTS-RD', 'W57-GL-B', 'WB-8', 'WCS-777', 
                        'WMD-8-PKG', 'WPG-1018', 'WPG-1624', 'WPG-810', 'WPM-24', 'WSI-84', 'WSK-12', 'WSK-6', 'WSK-60-RD', 'WSK-7', 'WSK-8', 
                        'WSK-9', 'WSS-4', 'WSS-7-B', 'WU-10', 'WU-11', 'WU-12', 'XHT-10', 'XHT-12', 'XHT-16', 'ZZD-12', 'ZZD-16', 'LUIB-75', 'LUIB-470', 
                        'LUIM-75', 'LUIM-80', 'ACIB17508', 'ACIB35010', 'ACIB75016', 'ACIBS10', 'ACIBS16', 'ACMIC1000D', 'ACMIC1000E', 'CUA100', 'CUA55',
                        'SLFRZ-1D','SLFRZ-1DES','SLFRZ-2D','SLFRZ-2DES','SLMER-1D','SLMER-1D-22','SLMER-2D','SLMER-2D','SLMPREP-1D','SLMPREP-1D','SLMPREP-2D','SLMPREP-2DW','SLPREP-1D',
                        'SLPREP-1D','SLPREP-2D','SLREF-1D','SLREF-1DES','SLREF-2D','SLREF-2DES','SLUF27','SLUF48','SLUF48','SLUR27','SLUR48','SLUR48',
                        'FBR-11-PRESS', 'FBR-13612NC', 'FBR-825NC', 'FBR-TACO'
                        ) 
                        ) X 
                        
                        LEFT JOIN ( 
                            SELECT DISTINCT PRNO as [Item Number] , MTNO , CNQT , MB.WHLO as Warehouse , STQT, ORQT, REQT, ALQT, AVAL, SSQT 
                            FROM M3.MPDMAT MP 
                            JOIN M3.MITBAL MB ON MP.MTNO = MB.ITNO 
                            WHERE STRT = 'KIT' 
                            ) A on X.Warehouse = A.Warehouse AND X.[Item Number] = A.[Item Number] AND X.Component = A.MTNO 
                        GROUP BY X.Warehouse, X.[Item Number], X.[Item Description], X.[Category], [Kit Flag]
                        ) X2
                        
                        LEFT JOIN (
                            SELECT ITNO, WHLO, SUM(ALQT) as AllocatedQty
                            FROM M3.OOLINE
                            WHERE ORNO = '1000415671'
                            GROUP BY ITNO, WHLO
                            ) B on X2.[Item Number] = B.ITNO and X2.Warehouse = B.WHLO
